problem id: 378741b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10011100 -> 11000010
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11010111 -> 01110011
  10111100 -> 11000010
  10110101 -> 01010010
  01100111 -> 01110001
  01000011 -> 00110001
  10001001 -> 10010010
  11110001 -> 00010011

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 00100010
